testsuite.name: demo.DashboardFilterTest
testsuite.system-err: mar. 06, 2026 4:40:25 P. M. org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch ADVERTENCIA: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 145 mar. 06, 2026 4:40:25 P. M. org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 ADVERTENCIA: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 145.0.7632.160. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.23.1` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
